goals: Store workspace design preferences for future reference
Search for previously stored ergonomic setup preferences
Review all stored design preferences to ensure completeness
Remove an outdated or incorrect preference

memories.text: Standing desks with matte finishes preferred
Prefers warm ambient lighting for coding sessions

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and practical, focused on creating functional workspaces that enhance productivity. Prefers organized, systematic approaches to capturing client preferences.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands workspace design principles and ergonomic considerations but does not know the internal tool names or APIs for the memory system.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored their workspace preferences, searched for specific preferences, reviewed all stored memories, and removed an outdated preference.
